tagline: A billing document summarised — number, status, dates, money rows, actions.
whenToUse: Invoice Card summarises a billing document inside Card chrome: an invoice number with a tone-coded status Badge and issued/due dates, a Description List of the money rows (subtotal, tax, fees, total), and Download-PDF plus optional Pay actions. Reach for it in a billing history list or an order's invoices tab where the whole document — not just its payment state — must be reviewable and downloadable. Use Payment Status when you only need a single payment's outcome, or Description List alone for arbitrary term/detail metadata.
